# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4

## Summary

Reviewed the branch diff and read `src/contexts/workflow_composition/review_classification.rs` and `src/contexts/workflow_composition/mod.rs` end-to-end. I did not find any correctness, safety, or robustness issues in the implemented review-classification schema and validation work. Targeted verification also passed: `cargo test review_classification --lib` ran successfully with 72 passing tests.

## Amendments

None.
